highlightedText:
Box of matches
	Food concentrate
	50 feet of nylon rope
	Parachute silk (降落伞布) 
	Portable heating unit
	Two .45 caliber pistols (.45口径手枪)
	One case of dehydrated milk (一箱脱水牛奶)
	Two 100 lb. tanks of oxygen (2个100磅氧气瓶)
	Stellar map
	Self-inflating life raft
	Magnetic compass
	20 liters of water
	Signal flares
	First aid kit, including injection needle
	Solar-powered FM receiver-transmitter

key_list: You are a crew member that was supposed to meet with another ship on the moon. Due to malfucntions, you alnded 200 miles
landed 200 miles away, and must make a journey to the other ship;
; your survival depends on it! Rank the following items in tem
rms of importance to your survival and making it to the other ship:

key_list: Why is water ranked so low if you die without it quickly?
